name: Séance
author: GhostWire

discovery.tagline: Summon videos from YouTube, Vimeo, Twitch & more into your library.

description: Paste a YouTube, Vimeo, Twitch, TikTok or Reddit link and Séance conjures the video straight into your library — pick a quality (up to best, or audio-only) and watch it materialize with live progress. Powered by yt-dlp.
